summary.en: Lithium cells and batteries in BESS shipments must be supported by UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, subsection 38.3 evidence for international transport. Côte d'Ivoire does not create a public BESS-specific exception in the official material reviewed; sea shipments normally require IMDG dangerous-goods documentation, SDS, proper UN number classification, packaging evidence, and carrier acceptance.
summary.zh: BESS货批中的锂电芯和电池须以《联合国试验和标准手册》第三部分第38.3小节证据支持国际运输。已审阅官方材料未发现科特迪瓦针对BESS设置公开特殊豁免；海运通常需要IMDG危险货物文件、安全数据表、正确UN编号分类、包装证据和承运人接受。
summary.zht: BESS貨批中的鋰電芯和電池須以《聯合國試驗和標準手冊》第三部分第38.3小節證據支持國際運輸。已審閱官方材料未發現象牙海岸針對BESS設置公開特殊豁免；海運通常需要IMDG危險貨物文件、安全資料表、正確UN編號分類、包裝證據和承運人接受。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, subsection 38.3
IMDG Code for sea transport of dangerous goods
Carrier and port dangerous-goods documentation requirements

summary.en: Chinese BESS exporters commonly hold UN 38.3 reports for cells and battery packs, but GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 are product or project safety standards and do not replace transport-classification evidence.
summary.zh: 中国BESS出口商通常持有电芯和电池包UN 38.3报告，但GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023属于产品或项目安全标准，不能替代运输分类证据。
summary.zht: 中國BESS出口商通常持有電芯和電池包UN 38.3報告，但GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023屬於產品或項目安全標準，不能替代運輸分類證據。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 test report for exported lithium cells and batteries

gap.en: Verify UN 38.3 reports for each shipped cell and battery configuration, confirm SDS and UN number declarations, and align the dangerous-goods declaration with the actual containerized BESS shipping state before booking vessel space.
gap.zh: 应核实每种发运电芯和电池配置的UN 38.3报告，确认安全数据表和UN编号申报，并在订舱前使危险货物申报与集装箱式BESS实际发运状态一致。
gap.zht: 應核實每種發運電芯和電池配置的UN 38.3報告，確認安全資料表和UN編號申報，並在訂艙前使危險貨物申報與集裝箱式BESS實際發運狀態一致。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for international transport of lithium cells and batteries; Côte d'Ivoire import does not remove carrier, IMDG, or port dangerous-goods obligations
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for international export transport of lithium cells and batteries from China

source.publisher: United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UN 38.3 transport evidence is separate from IEC or GB battery safety evidence and should be verified for every BESS cell and battery configuration shipped to Côte d'Ivoire.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] UN 38.3运输证据独立于IEC或GB电池安全证据，应针对发往科特迪瓦的每种BESS电芯和电池配置逐一核验。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] UN 38.3運輸證據獨立於IEC或GB電池安全證據，應針對發往象牙海岸的每種BESS電芯和電池配置逐一核驗。
